content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.28% with Metal/Energy leading, PSU Bank lagging. VIX cooling -3.9% to 17.66. Book is 60% deployed with mixed unrealized P&L. Priority is managing existing positions — trail SLs on winners, evaluate exits on losers approaching SL.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23999,
      "nifty_resistance": 24168
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -3.1% but CMP 79 holding above SL 76.50. Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%) supports thesis. SL has room — let it work. Not tightening because price still 3% above SL and intraday low 76.45 nearly hit it; tightening now risks immediate stop-out on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Up +7% — locking in is critical. Current SL 1032.38 already above entry (locks ~5% gain), so SL is fine as is. Tightening target slightly from 1110 to 1095 (just below 52w high 1141 resistance zone) to ensure faster exit given stock's parabolic run. Actually keeping SL — note: new_stop_loss equal to current is no-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -1.1%. SL 119 still ~4% away. FOMC this week is binary — keeping defensive exposure is prudent. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.4% with stock at fresh 52w high 1432. SL already at breakeven (1413 vs entry 1412.94). Current SL is essentially breakeven — no-op modify. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down -3.1%, CMP 2309 only 0.6% above SL 2295. Q4 results Apr 30 (T+2) is binary catalyst — letting SL do its job. If hit pre-results, exit; if survives, results catalyst could resolve. Not adjusting SL — already tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.7%, near 52w high 414. SL 406 already above entry 404.50 — locked in small gain. Power demand catalyst intact (256 GW peak). EDF nuclear partnership tailwind. Hold for target 425."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.4%, CMP 1797 vs SL 1770 (1.5% buffer). Stock at 52w high zone, +39% MTD — overbought risk. Letting SL hold; not loosening, not tightening as 1770 sits at recent intraday low support."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Flat at +0.2%. Organon acquisition is mixed (debt overhang flagged by analysts). MACD bearish crossover today. SL 1720 holds near recent support. Let it work; reassess if breaks 1720 or rallies to 1780."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down -0.3%. SL 318 just 0.7% below CMP 320 — tight. Near 52w high. Transmission monopoly thesis intact. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Loss approaching SL but not breached; intraday low 76.45 nearly tagged 76.50 SL — letting it ride. Strong Q4 fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1032 (locks +5% gain) — current setup is correct. No-op modify avoided."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL has room, FOMC catalyst this week."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 1413; no further action needed until +2% more move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already in place ahead of Apr 30 binary results event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; let winner run toward 425 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at recent support; overbought stock but thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Acquisition thesis mixed; SL at structural support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL near entry; transmission monopoly defensive."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "COALINDIA, MARUTI, ULTRACEMCO, ATGL all show post-results strength but the book is already 60% deployed with multiple Power/Energy names (NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER) — adding ATGL/COALINDIA would breach cluster discipline. ULTRACEMCO is the cleanest standalone setup but cement sector is weak today. PIRAMALFIN parabolic — too late to chase. SBICARD bearish but shorting on results day with 1.6x volume is choppy. INDUSINDBK distribution candle interesting but cluster risk in financials (already hold MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING). Will revisit tomorrow with fresh data.",
  "portfolio_notes": "60% deployed, 9 positions across PSU Bank, NBFC, FMCG (2), Pharma, Power (3), and Gold ETF. Power cluster is at the edge — NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER + GOLDBEES (commodity-linked) represents meaningful cluster concentration. Three pending orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) from prior session still OPEN — TATAPOWER would compound power-cluster risk. Recommending CANCEL of TATAPOWER pending order in next cycle if it doesn't fill today, given existing power exposure. Hysteresis rule applies: with 60% deployed and net unrealized only +0.25%, default for new entries is NO_ACTION today. Focus is on position management, not new adds."
}
